candidate.name: Sample Marketing Manager
candidate.cvText:
Senior Demand Generation Manager at Asana
New York, NY
6 years demand gen; full-funnel growth marketing.

Senior Demand Generation Manager · Asana · New York, NY
- Own $4M annual demand-gen budget; deliver 2,400 MQLs/quarter
- Demand generation, demand gen, content marketing, growth marketing, brand marketing
- Campaigns: paid social, paid search, ABM, account based marketing
- SEO, SEM, marketing automation, marketing ops, lead generation
- MQL → SQL conversion, attribution modeling, full-funnel reporting
- Field marketing event support, partner marketing co-marketing
- Tools: Marketo, HubSpot, Salesforce, 6sense, Bizible, Demandbase, Google Ads, LinkedIn Ads
knownIssues: cv-pulse rubric mismatch (upstream): role_type='marketing' (lowercase) doesn't match ALL_ROLES ['Marketing'] (case-sensitive) → defaults to AE rubric. CV has clear marketing signal — detectRole should return 'Marketing' from CV.

Matcher edge case (this repo): 'Marketing Operations Manager' classifies as 'marketing' family rather than 'revops' (title token order — 'marketing' appears first). For a marketing CV this masks the cross-family penalty, returning Good (79). Borderline; depends on whether MOps is taxonomically marketing or revops.
Matcher behaviour confirmed: cross-family Marketing → AE/CSM with low cvScore (50/48) + family penalty (40/35) lands at None (23/26). Defensible — appropriate penalty for low signal + cross-family.

jobs.title: Mid-Market Account Executive
jobs.note: Cross-family (sales) + low cvScore. Matcher returns None (23). Defensible.

jobs.title: Customer Success Manager
jobs.note: Cross-family (CSM) + low cvScore. Matcher returns None (26). Defensible.

jobs.title: Marketing Operations Manager
jobs.note: Edge case: classifier flags as marketing family → no cross-family penalty → Good (79). Could argue Partial if MOps belongs to revops family.
